data.content: Implementation review APPROVED. Both requirements fully satisfied: (1) Agent outcome stats captured in JSONL format with success classification based on exit code + state transition, stored in .foolery-logs/agent-success-rates.jsonl. This branch fixes concurrent safety by switching from read-modify-write JSON to atomic appendFile JSONL. (2) Error recovery flow correctly rolls back action states on non-zero exit, retries with strict agent exclusion via selectFromPoolStrict, and terminates loop when no alternative agent is available. Quality gates: tsc clean, 2134 tests pass, no lint errors in changed files. Test coverage includes concurrent append safety, error retry with agent switching, step failure rollback, and success classification.
